Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Intent]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Intent is something that can be bound into objects like wood or copper poles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Intent is a concept where lending it to an object over time helps the item perform its job better.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Intent is a property that can be held by doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Calder can focus his Intent like a scalpel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Intent can be Read from objects like paper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Intent can be invested into objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Calder uses Intent to focus on his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Intent is something Calder can focus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Everyone invests objects with their Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Alchemical wax used by Witnesses is sensitive to Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Intent is a focused purpose that can be used in Reading to improve objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Intent is a property of weapons that can be focused through accomplishments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Weapons can carry horrible Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Memory storage for a Reader is a function of human Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Naberius can produce a flow of great Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — An object used for years can become invested with a measurable amount of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Intent is something Readers can sense through the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart seemed to conform itself to Naberius' Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Intent can be flowed into objects like wood to give orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Calder uses Intent to adjust the ship's position.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Desperate Intent can be saved by an Awakened object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Intent can be used to read a person's background and emotions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Calder's Intent can bind people with absolute authority when using the Emperor's crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Water cannot wash away Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Intent is carried in the structure of an object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Intent is something that can be Read.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart possesses an infinite, ancient Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Jerri can focus her Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Naberius Clayborn has malicious Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Readers can feel impressions of an object's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder's sword possesses an ancient and focused Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Intent can be released and smothered by others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Calder reads the flow of hostile Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Intent can cling to remains or rocks.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Intent is the power of focused will possessed by all humans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Intent is a property possessed by humans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Intent is used subconsciously by everyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Intent can be invested into objects to enhance their abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — Investing Intent can make an object like a knife sharper or more reliable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Bones of the Dead Mother's Children are invested with power like an object held Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Intent in Shera's blade is blinding to a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — The blade Shera holds possesses a palpable weight of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Intent can be packed into weapons like spiked chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Intent is a human quality that can be sensed and manipulated through Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Intent can be used by a Reader and can be harmful.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Intent is a force that can degrade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Intent can be invested in objects like a spoon.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Intent can leak out from a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — The Lyathatan possesses Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Calder uses Intent to command the Lyathatan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Intent is a power that can be magnified by the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Reading a situation's Intent is risky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Intent can be sensed through Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Readers believe the physical structure of an Awakened object changes to align with invested Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Intent is a Magister's greatest weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Intent is an atmospheric presence that can seep into and stain objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Calder can move his Intent down through chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Calder can let his Intent drift through buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Calder detects a strange, hidden wisp of unusual Intent in the Emperor's chambers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan's Intent suggested he was at peace and ready to die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Intent can be used to tear ropes through focus and concentration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Blinding oneself is believed to help a Reader sense Intent more clearly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Intent can be felt when attempting to Read an object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Intent is a language used by Great Elders.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Intent is the power used to raise Alagaeus's castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Intent is a power that can be mustered or used to manipulate objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Shera can use her Intent even though she is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor can Read Intent in even the flimsiest object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Jorin explored the possibilities of Intent more deeply than anyone except the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Intent is a subtle radiation that can be picked up by a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Intent is a power that can be used to perceive thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Shera's knives are dense with Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan can read ambient Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Intent is something Lucan can pick up on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Intent is a power or mental state that must be controlled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Soulbound can tear the Intent from a Magister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Intent is a form of power that can be used to block weapons or lock hands in place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Intent can be invested to create weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Intent can be used to warp steel and break connections to relays.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Intent is a property or power that characters can project.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Intent is a power that can be felt or sensed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Jyrine's Intent is faster than the Imperial Guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Shera's weapon might react to her Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Intent can be used to exert physical force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — There are rumors among Consultants about what happens to Intent after death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Shera casts her Intent to create Bastion's Veil.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Steward's crown contains Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor's belongings leave behind a weight and intensity of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Intent can paralyze thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Investment is the process where an object performs better based on the strength, focus, and quantity of reinforcing Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Plants only store Intent if a person uses them for something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Intent is magnified by a network of earthbound devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — An invisible surge of Intent sealed every door and window on the Emperor's Stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The diamond in the White Sun medallion pulses with Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Intent is one of the three sources used in the Awakening process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Complex machinery interacts with Intent as a collection of parts rather than a single object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — A Soulbound Vessel may connect to a user's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Lyathatan's Intent is a mix of rage, patience, malice, pragmatism, hunger, and desires.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The division of possession depends on the strength of one's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Significance is a concept in Reading that is more difficult to quantify than Intent.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Breaking through Intent requires considerable power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Intent is a medium that can be radiated and read by certain Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor could break the binding of Estyr's Intent with his own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Intent can be bound up in a blade or invested in objects like battering rams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Intent can accomplish amazing things given enough time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan sensed weak Intent from the black linen bag.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Intent is something that can be tasted by opening one's senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Intent is a property that objects can possess which attracts Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Intent has many layers beneath the surface.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — The smoke bomb had a lot of Intent invested into it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Gardeners are more effective when not distracted by Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The air between the Great Elder and Jorin crackled with the clash of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Shera can reach Kelalrac using her Intent.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
